overview: The Kronenwetter Village Board held a special meeting on June 1, 2026, convening into closed session for approximately 44 minutes to review a specific personnel matter and address next steps. Upon returning to open session, the board took no action. The closed session was authorized under Wisconsin statutes governing personnel evaluation data and disciplinary proceedings.

agenda.item: Closed Session - Review of specific personnel matter and address next steps pursuant to Wis. Stat. 19.85(1)(c) and 19.85(1)(f)
Reconvene Open Session and action after closed session

discussions.body: Trustee Mortensen moved, seconded by Trustee Coyle, to convene into closed session under Wis. Stat. 19.85(1)(c) and 19.85(1)(f) to review a specific personnel matter and address next steps. The motion carried 6-0 on a roll call vote. The board, along with Administrator James Davel, remained in closed session from 5:03 p.m. to 5:47 p.m.
Upon reconvening into open session on a 6-0 motion by Mortensen and Myszka, the board took no action following the closed session personnel discussion.

actionItems: No formal action was taken following the closed session review of the personnel matter.
title: REVISED Special Village Board Meeting - 2026-06-01
